zh.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh.Marseilles, France: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter de Brus II於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素時，他的父親Sir Peter de Brus I39歲，母親Joan de Lacy21歲。他於1213年與Helewisa de Lancaster在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年9月7日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh-hans.Marseilles, France: 法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter de Brus II于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Peter de Brus I39岁，母亲Joan de Lacy21岁。他于1213年与Helewisa de Lancaster在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1241年9月7日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter de Brus II was born about 1190, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Peter de Brus I, was 39 and his mother, Joan de Lacy, was 21. He married Helewisa de Lancaster in 1213, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 7 September 1241, in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter de Brus II est né environ 1190, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Peter de Brus I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan de Lacy, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Helewisa de Lancaster en 1213, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1241, à Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter de Brus II um 1190 in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Peter de Brus I 39 und seine Mutter Joan de Lacy 21. Er hat 1213 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Helewisa de Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1241 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Brus II è nato il circa 1190 nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Peter de Brus I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Lacy, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Helewisa de Lancaster nel 1213, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1241, nel Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストル
ja.Skelton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン
ja.Marseilles, France: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンマーセイル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Brus IIが約1190年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Brus Iは39歳，母Joan de Lacyは21歳であった。1213年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでHelewisa de Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1241年9月7日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンマーセイルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Brus II(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Peter de Brus I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Lacy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1213년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Helewisa de Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 9월 7일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 마세이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Brus II nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Peter de Brus I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Lacy, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Helewisa de Lancaster em 1213, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1241, em Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter de Brus II родился около 1190 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Peter de Brus I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Lacy, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Helewisa de Lancaster в 1213 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 7 сентября 1241 г. в местности марсилл, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter de Brus II nació aproximadamente 1190, en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Peter de Brus I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan de Lacy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Helewisa de Lancaster en 1213, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1241, en Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
